title: The Land Where Souls Rest
description: Frieren and Fern pay a visit to Eisen, who requests their help in finding the notes of Flamme the Legendary Mage.

title: The Land Where Souls Rest
description: Frieren and Fern pay a visit to Eisen, who requests their help in finding the notes of Flamme the Legendary Mage.

title: The Land Where Souls Rest
description: Frieren and Fern pay a visit to Eisen, who requests their help in finding the notes of Flamme the Legendary Mage.

title: The Land Where Souls Rest
description: Frieren and Fern pay a visit to Eisen, who requests their help in finding the notes of Flamme the Legendary Mage.

title: Phantoms of the Dead
description: Frieren and Fern investigate ghost sightings at a village where people have started going missing.

title: The Hero of the Village
description: Frieren and Fern enlist Stark's help to fight the solar dragon - but is he up to the task?

title: Like a Fairy Tale
description: After reflecting on the transient nature of the past as it exists in people's collective memories, Frieren unexpectedly runs into a sworn enemy.

title: Frieren the Slayer
description: As tensions in Graf Granat's domain reach a breaking point, Fern and Stark find their own resolve - and Frieren resumes an old duty.

title: Aura the Guillotine
description: While Fern and Stark make a temporary retreat with Graf Granat, Frieren's true foe awaits her outside the city.

title: A Powerful Mage
description: Frieren's many years of training under her teacher Flamme are tested in her confrontation with Aura the Guillotine. Will Aura's scales find her wanting?

title: Winter in the Northern Lands
description: Frieren and her companions continue their journey through the northern lands, but obstacles both natural and manmade still stand in their way.

title: A Real Hero
description: Deep in the mountains of the northern lands, Frieren and her party arrive at the Village of the Sword, where they have another job to do.

title: Aversion to One's Own Kind
description: While passing by a village in the woods of the northern lands, Frieren and party meet Sein, a gifted priest who is nonetheless corrupt enough to give even Heiter a run for his money. But what happened in his past?

title: Privilege of the Young
description: The party arrives in a large and lively town with a bustling shopping district that Frieren once visited with Himmel, but something seems to have come up between Fern and Stark.

title: Smells Like Trouble
description: When the party happens upon a town whose inhabitants are all mysteriously asleep, it's time for their newest traveling companion to prove his mettle.

title: Long-Lived Friends
description: Frieren pays a visit to Old Man Voll, a long-lived friend of hers, with traveling companions in tow.

title: Take Care
description: Now that Sein finally has a lead on the whereabouts of his long-lost friend, is it time for him and Frieren's party to part ways?

title: First-Class Mage Exam
description: Frieren and party finally arrive in Äußerst, ready to undergo the first-class mage exam, and meet a number of colorful characters who are there to do the same.

title: Well-Laid Plans
description: Frieren and her new teammates hatch a plan to capture a Stille - but are the other teams just going to stand by and let it happen?

title: Necessary Killing
description: The first-class mage exam intensifies as fighting breaks out between the participants - and what's at stake might even be worth killing for.

title: The World of Magic
description: Frieren, Kanne, and Lawine struggle with the 13th party over possession of the Stille, but there'll be more surprises in store before their battle, and the first test, reach their conclusion.

title: Future Enemies
description: After the conclusion of the first test, the exam participants have some time to kill in town. What do mages get up to on their days off?

title: Conquering the Labyrinth
description: The aspiring first-class mages now face their second test: conquering the Ruins of the King's Tomb. A simple task, or so the proctor claims, but there's a reason this particular dungeon remains unexplored.

title: Perfect Replicas
description: Due to the Spiegel, a legendary monster that can create perfect replicas of others, the test-takers who would conquer the Ruins of the King's Tomb must first face the ultimate enemy: themselves.

title: A Fatal Vulnerability
description: A perfect imitation of Frieren stands between the test-takers and victory, but Fern believes she knows how to win. Is it time for the student to surpass the master?

title: The Height of Magic
description: To defeat Spiegel, Frieren and Fern fight against Frieren's replica, but have a tough time. Meanwhile, Denken, Lavine, and the others fight against the replicas, but the magic of Sense, a first-class mage and the exam's proctor, rages.

title: An Era of Humans
description: With the second test behind them, only one remains - but first, Frieren and Fern need to settle an important matter in town. What awaits them in the third test?

title: It Would Be Embarrassing When We Met Again
description: As the first-class mage exam concludes and the test-takers go their separate ways, farewell leads to departure - but the next stage of Frieren's journey has only just begun.
